## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Monograph and growthx.ai to discuss SEO strategy, content production, and AI-driven visibility efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is producing 5 articles/week for Monograph, transitioning back to a review process](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [New experiment launching: publishing Monograph content on Reddit to improve geo visibility](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [growthx.ai developing internal analytics tool (Atlas) to better track LLM/AI visibility performance](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Monograph team to review resources and Looker dashboard for deeper insights into current strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [Currently producing 5 articles every 1-2 weeks for Monograph](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Transitioning back to review process starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Robert to approve more topics to maintain healthy content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [growthx.ai incorporates feedback into writing guidelines for ongoing quality improvement](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

### Reddit Experiment for Geo Visibility

  - [Publishing as Monograph's company account on their user page (u/Monograph)](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Not yet posting in subreddits to avoid rule violations and account bans](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Content written natively for Reddit, focusing on unique data and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Monitoring performance through custom prompt clusters in Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Example article shared: "Why Architect Average Salary Stays Low"](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Keyword and Prompt Strategy

  - [Prompts based on keyword strategy but focused on questions, not just keywords](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Process: Scrape forums/subreddits for common questions, rank topics by frequency](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Design prompt clusters addressing these topics for more accurate LLM visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Recent focus on engineering-related content as per Robert's request](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### Atlas: growthx.ai's Internal Tool

  - [Manages intent, desired outputs, and various content types (blog posts, Reddit, hub pages, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Stores contextual artifacts: success stories, writing guidelines, audience personas, company dossier](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Will eventually provide analytics dashboard for clients (currently in development)](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Looker dashboard available (pinned in Slack channel) for current performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Monthly in-depth reports with recommendations for strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Trending upwards in ChatGPT traffic, remains the top LLM referrer for Monograph](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)

### Technical SEO

  - [growthx.ai can provide audits and recommendations but doesn't implement technical changes](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [No major issues identified with Monograph's site, but detailed audit available upon request](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### Competitor Research

  - [Available through Scrunch, but no client-facing dashboard yet](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [growthx.ai can provide screenshots or walk through Scrunch data on calls](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Monograph team can use existing Ahrefs or SEMrush accounts for additional competitive research](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement review process for content starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Robert to approve more content topics to maintain pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Monograph team to review provided resources and Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [Consider scheduling strategic reset meeting if needed after resource review](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [growthx.ai to continue monitoring and reporting on ChatGPT/LLM traffic performance](https://fathom.video/share/nz6gFzBBxmp8QZmQBdGGsDXsMyxU7i4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
